# dist/

Repository-level distribution output. This directory is generated by
`npm run dist:windows` (see the root `package.json` and `scripts/dist-windows.mjs`)
and is not meant to be hand-edited.

## windows/

Produced by exporting the already-built Tauri release artifacts out of the
deeply nested `source-v1.0.1/7-rate-OpenMouseGesture-b8f5357/src-tauri/target/release/...`
tree into a conventional, predictable location:

- `OpenMouseGesture-x64.exe` — the release binary (unpacked)
- `OpenMouseGesture-Setup-x64.exe` — the NSIS installer
- `SHA256SUMS.txt` — SHA-256 hashes for both artifacts
- `build-info.json` — version, build timestamp, source commit SHA, and artifact hashes

Build the app first (`npm run tauri build` inside
`source-v1.0.1/7-rate-OpenMouseGesture-b8f5357/`), then run
`npm run dist:windows` from the repository root. The command re-exports from
scratch each time, so `dist/windows/` always reflects the most recent build.

Generated `.exe` files and `build-info.json`/`SHA256SUMS.txt` are gitignored;
only this README is tracked so the directory and command are discoverable
after a fresh clone.
